word: H64 - אָבֵל כְּרָמִים - ʼÂbêl Kᵉrâmîym - aw-bale' ker-aw-meem' - Plain of the vineyards

sections.paragraph:
אבל כּרמים - 'âbêl kerâmı̂ym - aw-bale' ker-aw-meem'

From H58 and the plural of H3754; meadow of vineyards; Abel-Keramim, a place in Palestine: - plain of the vineyards.
Cognate: H58, H59, H62, H63, H65, H66, H67
